# Delta

[![Coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/example/delta/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://example.com)

## Overview

Stable fact: delta stores cache files under `.delta/cache`.

## Commands

Use `delta clean` to remove generated cache entries.

Run `delta --help`:

```text
Usage: delta [command]

Flags:
  -h, --help      help for delta
      --version   version for delta
```
